creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nikolai Lifanov from comment #3)
Works for me, so you have to debug this locally.

I think that easiest is to rebuild libc.so on i386 machine or jail and then copy to /usr/lib32.  Use a command like this in lib/libc

# make WITHOUT_TESTS=yes DEBUG_FLAGS=-g -j 32 all
